title: An Actor Learns About Doctors from a TV Show
summary: Gerran Howell is an actor from Wales who plays a student doctor in a TV show called The Pitt. This show is about doctors and nurses working in a hospital in Pittsburgh, USA. Gerran says the show is very realistic because it has real doctors helping the actors. They watched videos and learned how to use medical tools to make it look real. He has a lot more respect for real doctors now because he sees how hard their job is. There is also a fun rumor that George Clooney, a famous actor, might have helped Gerran get the role. Gerran's character starts out scared but gets better at his job in the show. The show is made by people who want it to be accurate, so it teaches viewers about medicine too.

background_read: This article is about an actor named Gerran Howell who plays a student doctor on a TV show called The Pitt. The show tries to be very realistic by having real doctors help the actors learn medical things. Gerran talks about how this made him respect real doctors more. There is also a story that a famous actor, George Clooney, might have helped Gerran get the role. The show is popular and teaches people about what doctors do.
Article_Structure: WHO: Gerran Howell, a Welsh actor
WHAT: He acts in a realistic TV show about doctors called The Pitt and learned about medicine
WHERE: Set in a hospital in Pittsburgh, USA, and he is from Barry, Wales
WHY: To show how the show's accuracy gives him respect for real doctors and to share a rumor about his role

perspectives.description: Gerran Howell shares his personal experience acting in a medical drama and how it changed his view of doctors.
